description: Stunning ivory lace wedding dress with a sheer illusion neckline and long sleeves

Stretch jersey sheath dress with ruched waist and side slit
Sparkly sequin prom gown featuring an illusion neckline and sweep train in royal navy and silver

A short cocktail dress in pink crepe with feather trim and off-shoulder sleeves

Strapless sweetheart neckline glitter gown with layered skirt
Semi-formal party dress in sparkly rose gold sequins with puff sleeves and short hemline
